name: social
description: Social publishing via self-hosted Postiz Public API (C13)
config_hints: Deploy Postiz separately (AGPL-3); connect platforms in Postiz UI — not in AEGIS
Set cluster_address/port to your Postiz backend; API key → deploy/broker/social/api-key.txt (0600)

morning post queue cron: { "id": "social-morning", "cron": "07:30", "text": "List scheduled posts for today via /mcp social integrations_list; summarize queue for owner review — do not publish without /approve", "session_id": "webchat:local" }
